name: Taj Palace Delhi
description: A magnificent 5-star heritage hotel located in the heart of New Delhi, blending Mughal architecture with modern luxury, offering unparalleled hospitality and world-class amenities for discerning travelers.

policies.cancellation: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival
policies.dress_code: Smart casual attire required in public areas

dining.restaurant: Masque - Multi-cuisine restaurant, open 7:00 AM - 11:00 PM
dining.lounge: The Chambers - British colonial style bar, open 11:00 AM - 11:30 PM
dining.coffee_shop: The Tea Lounge - Specialty teas and coffees, open 10:00 AM - 10:00 PM

fitness.gym: Fitness center with modern equipment, open 6:00 AM - 10:00 PM
fitness.pool: Temperature-controlled outdoor swimming pool, open 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM
fitness.spa: J Wellness Circle - Ayurvedic treatments, massages, and wellness therapies
fitness.yoga: Daily yoga sessions available at sunrise

business.conference_rooms: 8 banquet halls and conference rooms for 20-1000 guests
business.business_center: Open 24 hours with computers, printers, and secretarial services
business.wifi: Complimentary high-speed WiFi throughout the property
business.translation: Multi-lingual staff available for business assistance

other.laundry: Express laundry and dry cleaning services
other.currency_exchange: Foreign currency exchange at front desk
other.gift_shop: Bungalow 8 - Curated Indian handicrafts and souvenirs
other.library: Heritage library with books on Indian culture and history
other.art_gallery: Rotating exhibitions of contemporary Indian art

features: Mini-bar with Indian and international beverages

services.security: 24-hour security with CCTV and trained personnel
services.bell_service: Bell service with traditional Indian welcome
services.tour_desk: Personalized tour planning for Delhi and Agra excursions
services.airport_transfer: Complimentary airport transfers for suite guests

accessibility.hearing_impaired: Hearing loop systems in public areas
accessibility.visual_impaired: Braille signage and audio guides available

cultural_experiences.traditional_welcome: Personalized welcome with garlands and tilak
cultural_experiences.festive_celebrations: Special decorations and events during Indian festivals
cultural_experiences.culinary_experiences: Cooking classes for regional Indian cuisines
cultural_experiences.heritage_walks: Guided tours of the hotel's Mughal architecture

breakfast: Complimentary buffet breakfast with Indian, Continental, and Asian cuisines served 6:30 AM - 10:30 AM
wifi: Complimentary high-speed WiFi in all rooms and public areas
gym: Modern fitness center with personal trainers
pool: Temperature-controlled outdoor swimming pool with poolside service
